mapper.select: /* TripleHistMgmtMapper.getTripleHistContractNum */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM ,A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN ,SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(NVL(A.USER_SSN, ' ')), 1,6) AS USER_SSN ,A.SUB_LINK_NAME ,B.LST_RATE_CD ,B.LST_RATE_NM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, MSP_REQUEST_DTL B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/* TripleHistMgmtMapper.getTripleHistRate */ SELECT A.RATE_CD , A.RATE_NM , A.APPL_STRT_DT , A.APPL_END_DT , A.BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} ORDER BY A.RATE_NM

/* TripleHistMgmtMapper.getTripleHistAddition */ SELECT A.RATE_CD , B.ADD_SVC_CD AS ADD_SVC_CD , B.SVC_REL_TP , B.SERVICE_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0059', B.SVC_REL_TP) AS SVC_REL_TP_NM , C.RATE_NM AS ADD_SVC_NM , C.APPL_STRT_DT , C.APPL_END_DT , C.BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , MSP_PROD_REL_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND B.ADD_SVC_CD = #{additionCd} AND A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND B.ADD_SVC_CD = C.RATE_CD AND C.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' ORDER BY A.APPL_STRT_DT DESC

SELECT CD_VAL AS ADDITION_CD , CD_DSC AS ADDITION_NM FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A , MSP_RATE_MST B , MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT_ADD C WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'RCP9043' AND A.CD_VAL = B.RATE_CD AND B.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND B.RATE_CD = C.SOC(+) AND C.PRMT_ID IN ( SELECT A.PRMT_ID FROM MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT A , MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT_RATE B WHERE A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT )
